Notably, as only two healthy control lines were available (one male‑derived, one female‑derived), the comparison reflects line‑specific differences rather than a general sex effect. The Tr5L line was removed because it was present only in SPb samples.

## Genes linked to reprogramming method (Sendai vs lentivirus)
```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
meta_data_selected <- meta_data %>%
	filter(mutation == "Parkin")

ddsHTSeq_selected <- DESeqDataSetFromHTSeqCount(
	sampleTable = meta_data_selected,
	directory = "data/htseq/",
	design = ~ place + replicate + reprogramming
)

rownames(ddsHTSeq_selected) <- sub("\\..*", "", rownames(ddsHTSeq_selected))
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
keep_selected <- rowSums(counts(ddsHTSeq_selected) >= min_counts) >= ncol(ddsHTSeq_selected) * min_prop_samples
ddsHTSeq_selected <- ddsHTSeq_selected[keep_selected, ]

ddsHTSeq_selected <- DESeq(ddsHTSeq_selected)

res_selected <- results(ddsHTSeq_selected, contrast = c("reprogramming", "sendai", "lentivirus"))

deg.selected <- get_DEG(res_selected)

deg.selected.add <- ensbl2geneid %>%
	left_join(deg.selected %>% rownames_to_column("gene_id"), by = "gene_id") %>%
	arrange(desc(log2FoldChange))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
rownames(deg.selected.add) <- 1:nrow(deg.selected.add)
datatable(deg.selected.add, 
          caption = "Table 60. Differentially expressed genes associated with reprogramming method (Sendai vs lentivirus).",
          style = "bootstrap5", 
          extensions = 'Buttons', 
          options = list(dom = 'lBfrtip', 
              buttons = c('csv', 'excel')))
```

## Comparison of healthy control lines (male‑derived vs female‑derived)
```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
meta_data_gender <- meta_data %>%
	filter(mutation == "Health")

ddsHTSeq_gender <- DESeqDataSetFromHTSeqCount(
	sampleTable = meta_data_gender,
	directory = "data/htseq/",
	design = ~ place + replicate + gender
)

rownames(ddsHTSeq_gender) <- sub("\\..*", "", rownames(ddsHTSeq_gender))

keep_gender <- rowSums(counts(ddsHTSeq_gender) >= min_counts) >= ncol(ddsHTSeq_gender) * min_prop_samples
ddsHTSeq_gender <- ddsHTSeq_gender[keep_gender, ]

ddsHTSeq_gender <- DESeq(ddsHTSeq_gender)

res_gender <- results(ddsHTSeq_gender, contrast = c("gender", "male", "female"))

deg.gender <- get_DEG(res_gender)

deg.gender.add <- ensbl2geneid %>%
	left_join(deg.gender %>% rownames_to_column("gene_id"), by = "gene_id") %>%
	arrange(desc(log2FoldChange))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
rownames(deg.gender.add) <- 1:nrow(deg.gender.add)
datatable(deg.gender.add, 
          caption = "Table 61. Differentially expressed genes between healthy control lines: male‑derived vs female‑derived.",
          style = "bootstrap5", 
          extensions = 'Buttons', 
          options = list(dom = 'lBfrtip', 
              buttons = c('csv', 'excel')))
```

## Genes linked to laboratory origin (Moscow vs Saint Petersburg)
```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
meta_data_place <- meta_data %>%
	filter(is.na(str_extract(sampleid, "Tr5L")))

ddsHTSeq_place <- DESeqDataSetFromHTSeqCount(
	sampleTable = meta_data_place,
	directory = "data/htseq/",
	design = ~ place + replicate + condition
)

rownames(ddsHTSeq_place) <- sub("\\..*", "", rownames(ddsHTSeq_place))

keep_place <- rowSums(counts(ddsHTSeq_place) >= min_counts) >= ncol(ddsHTSeq_place) * min_prop_samples
ddsHTSeq_place <- ddsHTSeq_place[keep_place, ]

ddsHTSeq_place <- DESeq(ddsHTSeq_place)

res_place <- results(ddsHTSeq_place, contrast = c("place", "Msc", "SPb"))

deg.place <- get_DEG(res_place)

deg.place.add <- ensbl2geneid %>%
	left_join(deg.place %>% rownames_to_column("gene_id"), by = "gene_id") %>%
	arrange(desc(log2FoldChange))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
rownames(deg.place.add) <- 1:nrow(deg.place.add)
datatable(deg.place.add, 
          caption = "Table 62. Differentially expressed genes associated with laboratory origin (Moscow vs Saint Petersburg).",
          style = "bootstrap5", 
          extensions = 'Buttons', 
          options = list(dom = 'lBfrtip', 
              buttons = c('csv', 'excel')))
```
